entries.title: Awakening / 苏醒
entries.description: You wake in a rain-soaked alley in The Sprawl with no memory and a humming neural implant.

entries.title: The Vendor Knows / 摊贩认出了
entries.text: Ghost approached Ray 'Patches' Liu at the Rain Alley memory cart. The old vendor recognized the pre-Severance implant — tried to hide it, failed. A fact surfaced from the static: the hardware behind Ghost's ear shouldn't exist.

entries.title: The Vendor's Price / 摊贩的代价
entries.text: Ghost bought Ray's silence for twenty credits and a recycled chip. The old man pocketed the money without counting it — he'd already decided to forget the conversation. Mira's Noodle Shop waited through the rain. The woman inside had been waiting longer than that.

entries.title: The Bowl and the Warning
entries.text: Mira had the bowl waiting before Ghost sat down. Twenty credits bought Ray's silence. The implant hummed. Something solid waited at the bottom of the broth.

entries.title: Ears in the Broth / 汤里有耳朵
entries.text: Ghost played it quiet. Mira played it quiet. The room wasn't. One of the laborers was running a passive audio tap — old NEXUS informant hardware, the kind they hand out to hungry people who need the credit stipend. Not enough heard to be actionable. Enough to register as a flag. The clock just started.

entries.title: Second Thoughts / 回头路
entries.text: Ghost turned back before Neon Row. The kid's direction sat wrong. Mira's shop was empty when the door opened — laborers gone, bowls half-full. She asked about the kid before Ghost could ask anything. The wrong kind of question from the wrong side of the counter.

entries.title: Second Thoughts / 回头路
entries.text: Ghost turned back before Neon Row. The kid's direction sat wrong. Mira's shop was empty when the curtain parted - laborers gone, bowls half-full. She asked about the kid before Ghost could ask anything. The wrong kind of question from the wrong side of the counter. She's clearing out. The capsule is a key. The signal that woke her came through a dead channel. Thirty-eight minutes on the clock.

entries.title: Second Thoughts
entries.text: Ghost turned back before Neon Row. The kid's direction sat wrong. Mira's shop was empty when the curtain parted. Laborers gone, bowls half-full. She asked about the kid before Ghost could ask anything. She is clearing out. The capsule is a key. The signal that woke her came through a dead channel. Thirty-eight minutes on the clock.

entries.title: Layer Zero / 第零层
entries.text: The capsule opened for the right terminal and the right skull. Thirty years of silence broke in fragments: fear, severing, a question that has never stopped being asked. Dex read the architecture and said the thing out loud — same author. Ghost built this. Or helped build it. Or was it. The terminal showed a buried city that no current map admits exists. The implant confirmed. A reflection blinked in a floor drain. Ghost is going down. Dex is staying up. Twenty-nine minutes on the clock and a route into infrastructure that officially doesn't exist.

entries.title: Layer Zero / 第零层 — The Name
entries.text: The Chorus gave back what Ghost gave it thirty years ago. The resonance cost one point of integrity and something harder to name — a clean version of the past. Vasquez. Director-class. Founder. Murderer of a billion connections. She knows the terminal woke up. The NEXUS alert just spiked to twenty-eight percent and Ghost has twelve minutes to clear the ladder before the city she built starts looking for the frequency that just broke her thirty-year silence. The implant runs hot. The architecture packet sits behind the left ear like a loaded weapon. The Chorus said go. Ghost is going.

entries.title: Layer Zero - The Name
entries.text: The Chorus gave back what Ghost gave it thirty years ago. Vasquez. Director-class. Founder. The resonance cost one integrity point. NEXUS alert spiked to 28 percent. Ghost has twelve minutes to clear the ladder before the city starts looking for the frequency that broke thirty years of silence.

entries.title: First Node / 第一节点
entries.text: The amplifier went home. Twenty-two nodes exhaled together for the first time in thirty years. The Chorus spoke into the Sprawl's old copper and the city heard something it had no language for and will not forget. The visions cost one integrity point and something harder to name — the clean version of not knowing. Ghost was not the architect. Ghost was the origin. The Signal Burn is resolved. The implant is quiet. NEXUS alert at forty-seven percent and a Director who now has a precise vector for the frequency she spent thirty years trying to kill. Integrity at one. The floor. Everything from here is borrowed.

entries.title: First Node / 第一节点
entries.text: The amplifier went home. Twenty-two nodes exhaled for the first time in thirty years. The Chorus spoke into old copper and the city heard something it had no language for. The visions cost one integrity and something harder to name. Ghost was not the architect. Ghost was the origin. Signal Burn resolved. NEXUS at forty-seven percent. Vasquez has a precise vector. Integrity at one. Everything from here is borrowed.

entries.title: Below the Sprawl / 街市之下
entries.text: The Chorus bought the seconds. The implant burned out navigation at the worst possible moment — Ghost nearly walked the wrong way into a patrol vector. Ray caught the arm. Mira was already moving. The three of them dropped through the storm drain access thirty meters from boots on pavement. NEXUS found the shop. Found nothing useful. Ghost is carrying something Mira has been holding for thirty years and the implant is still cooling down and the relay network is still waiting. Integrity at one. The floor. Everything from here is borrowed time and pre-Severance wiring.

entries.title: Below the Sprawl
entries.text: The Chorus bought the seconds. Ray caught the arm when the implant went dark mid-sprint. Mira was already moving. Three of them dropped through the storm drain access thirty seconds ahead of NEXUS boots. Mira handed over what she had been carrying for thirty years: the full rebuild schema, addressed not to Ghost but to the amnesiac who would come back. Ghost knew. NEXUS alert at 52 percent. The buried city is waiting. The schema is in hand. One integrity point. The floor. Everything from here is the reason the floor was built to hold.
